abilities.name: Blazing Fury
abilities.rawDescription:
Each Round: 20% chance to increase Fire Damage Dealt by 10% and grant First-Strike to one Ally in any lane for 2 rounds, prioritizing Allies that deal Fire Damage.

Rounds 1, 4, 6, and 9: deal Tactical Damage to one enemy within adjacency at a 110% Damage Rate.

At 6+ Stars:

Rounds 2, 5, and 8: apply Recovery to the Ally with the least current troops at a 50% Recovery Rate, enhanced by Intelligence. Resistance applies to the same selected Ally. Resistance has a 40% activation chance at effective Habit Level 1 and lasts 2 rounds.

notes: Selection prioritizes allies with verified Fire Damage output.
Mitigated by target Intelligence.
Enemy adjacency semantics are not yet verified.

unresolvedQuestions: Enemy adjacency semantics for Tactical Damage target.

abilities.name: Sentinel's Wit
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard, increase Syrax Tactical Damage Dealt by 16%. Increase Instinct and Initiative of Left Flank ally by +20.

abilities.name: Mindful Synergy
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: increase Intelligence and Instinct of 3 Allies in any lane until end of combat, enhanced by Syrax Initiative.
unresolvedQuestions: Exact enhanced-by-Initiative formula.

abilities.name: Flight Mastery
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: increase Initiative of 3 Allies and reduce Initiative of 3 Enemies in any lane until end of combat, enhanced by Syrax Instinct.
unresolvedQuestions: Exact enhanced-by-Instinct formula.

abilities.name: Strategic Revival
abilities.rawDescription: Augments Blazing Fury: Rounds 2, 5, 8 recover the Ally with least current troops. Recovery is multiplied by 1.5 if any enemy has Slow. Chance to grant Resistance (-20%) for 2 rounds.

abilities.name: Tactical Inferno
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1: increase Tactical Damage Dealt of one Ally, prioritizing Left Flank, and Fire Damage Dealt of one Ally, prioritizing Right Flank, for 3 rounds.

notes: Preferred position is not an absolute requirement.
Preferred position is not an absolute requirement.

unresolvedQuestions: Whether one mixed-damage Ally may receive both modifiers.
Fallback selection when preferred flank lacks matching output.

abilities.name: Mother's Mercy
abilities.rawDescription: Each Round: chance to cleanse two Negative effects and one Control effect from one Ally in any lane, prioritizing Allies afflicted with Control.

notes: Control includes Stun, Stagger, Overwhelm, and Confusion.

unresolvedQuestions: Whether removing one Control also consumes one Negative-effect removal.
Selection order when multiple Control effects exist.

notes: Selection prioritizes allies with verified Fire Damage output.
Mitigated by target Intelligence.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription:
Each Round: 20% chance to increase Fire Damage Dealt by 10% and grant First-Strike to one Ally in any lane for 2 rounds, prioritizing Allies that deal Fire Damage.

Rounds 1, 4, 6, and 9: deal Tactical Damage to one enemy within adjacency at a 110% Damage Rate.

At 6+ Stars:

Rounds 2, 5, and 8: apply Recovery to the Ally with the least current troops at a 50% Recovery Rate, enhanced by Intelligence. Resistance applies to the same selected Ally. Resistance has a 40% activation chance at effective Habit Level 1 and lasts 2 rounds.
At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard, increase Syrax Tactical Damage Dealt by 16%. Increase Instinct and Initiative of Left Flank ally by +20.
Start of Combat: increase Intelligence and Instinct of 3 Allies in any lane until end of combat, enhanced by Syrax Initiative.
Start of Combat: increase Initiative of 3 Allies and reduce Initiative of 3 Enemies in any lane until end of combat, enhanced by Syrax Instinct.
Augments Blazing Fury: Rounds 2, 5, 8 recover the Ally with least current troops. Recovery is multiplied by 1.5 if any enemy has Slow. Chance to grant Resistance (-20%) for 2 rounds.
Start of Round 1: increase Tactical Damage Dealt of one Ally, prioritizing Left Flank, and Fire Damage Dealt of one Ally, prioritizing Right Flank, for 3 rounds.
Each Round: chance to cleanse two Negative effects and one Control effect from one Ally in any lane, prioritizing Allies afflicted with Control.
